title: Sculk Horde Survival
description: A nerve wracking expanding evil type pack
body:
# Sculk Horde Survival **A nerve wracking expanding evil type pack** This pack features the Sculk Horde as it's primary feature. In order to start the pack, make your way to 0, -64, 0 and initiate the horde! Make sure to get out quick lest you become subsumed by the sculk. Use Eureka! to make a mobile base, and try to defeat the sculk after it has spread and save the world. With many custom enemies, mobs, and difficult gameplay mechanics, this pack is a surefire way to keep your anxiety levels much higher than normal.

## Additional Performance/QOL Mods **Certain performance mods could not be bundled due to restrictions** *(Note: these mods are not required)* **All Below Require [Cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard/)** - [Smooth Chunk Save](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smooth-chunk-save) - [Farsight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farsight) - [Chunk Sending](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chunk-sending-forge-fabric) - [Better FPS - Render Distance](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-fps-render-distance)

## Attributions ### Shaders - [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) ### Mods - [Divine Weaponry - Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/divine-weaponry) - [Krypton Reforged](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/krypton-reforged) - [Magnesium/Rubidium Dynamic Lights](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamiclights-reforged) - [Inventory HUD+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge) - [More Overlays Updated](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-overlays-updated) - [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks) - [Worldedit](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit)
